zh.Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henricus De Ardene於大約1098年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Siward de Arden45歲，母親Cecilia20歲。他於1111年與Oliva在英國英格蘭越可爾斯泰斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1166年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henricus De Ardene于大约1098年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Siward de Arden45岁，母亲Cecilia20岁。他于1111年与Oliva在英国英格兰越可爾斯泰斯比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1166年之后。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ardene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Henricus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Henricus De Ardene was born about 1098, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Siward de Arden, was 45 and his mother, Cecilia, was 20. He married Oliva in 1111, in Stainsby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1166.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henricus De Ardene est né environ 1098, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Siward de Arden, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Cecilia, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Oliva en 1111, à Stainsby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1166.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henricus De Ardene um 1098 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Siward de Arden 45 und seine Mutter Cecilia 20. Er hat 1111 in Stainsby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Oliva geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1166.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henricus De Ardene è nato il circa 1098 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Siward de Arden, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Oliva nel 1111, nel Stainsby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1166.

ja.lifeSummary: Henricus De Ardeneが約1098年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Siward de Ardenは45歳，母Ceciliaは20歳であった。1111年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスティインスビーでOlivaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1166年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henricus De Ardene(이)가 대략 1098년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Siward de Arden(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1111년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스테인스비에서 Oliva(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1166년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henricus De Ardene nasceu aproximadamente 1098, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Siward de Arden, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Oliva em 1111, em Stainsby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1166.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henricus De Ardene родился около 1098 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Siward de Arden было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Oliva в 1111 г. в местности стеинсби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1166 г.

sm.Abt 1098–after 1166: e tusa o le 1098–ina ua ma'ea le 1166

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henricus De Ardene nació aproximadamente 1098, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Siward de Arden, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Cecilia, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Oliva en 1111, en Stainsby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1166.
